appDescription.message: noooo youtube shorts — Block YouTube Shorts and quit the short-video doomscroll.

popupBlockDesc.message: Blocks Shorts pages and entry points.

popupShowDesc.message: On: open as a normal video. Off: send to the block page.

statusShow.message: Opening Shorts as normal video pages.

statusBlock.message: Blocking Shorts with the block page.

blockedBody.message: This Short was blocked. Instead of endless short videos, go find what you actually wanted to watch.

blockedHint.message: To turn blocking off, use the extension icon in your toolbar.
